requirements_met: AC-001: All 13 payload classes exist and instantiate with required fields
AC-003: All models use from __future__ import annotations
AC-005: BuildCompletePayload serialises to JSON matching wire format

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] All 13 payload classes exist and instantiate with their required fields
completion_promises.evidence: All 13 payload classes (FeaturePlannedPayload, FeatureReadyForBuildPayload, BuildStartedPayload, BuildProgressPayload, BuildCompletePayload, BuildFailedPayload, AgentStatusPayload, ApprovalRequestPayload, ApprovalResponsePayload, IntentClassifiedPayload, DispatchPayload, AgentHeartbeatPayload, AgentDeregistrationPayload) exist in the events/ package and instantiate successfully. Verified by parametrized test test_payload_class_instantiates across all 13 classes plus individual field-level assertions.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] All models use `ConfigDict(extra="ignore")` for forward-compatible parsing
completion_promises.evidence: All 13 models have model_config = ConfigDict(extra='ignore'). Verified by parametrized test test_model_config_extra_ignore and test_extra_fields_silently_discarded across all 13 classes.

All 5 event modules (_pipeline.py, _agent.py, _jarvis.py, _fleet.py, __init__.py) contain 'from __future__ import annotations'. Verified by AST-based test test_module_has_future_annotations across all modules.
Every field in all 13 payload classes has a non-empty description. Verified by parametrized test test_all_fields_have_descriptions that iterates model_fields for each class.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `BuildCompletePayload` serialises to JSON matching the wire format in `API-message-contracts.md`
completion_promises.evidence: Added optional 'repo' and 'branch' fields to BuildCompletePayload to match the wire format documented in API-message-contracts.md. The JSON output now includes all wire format keys (feature_id, build_id, repo, branch, pr_url, duration_seconds, tasks_completed, tasks_failed, tasks_total, summary). Verified by test_build_complete_matches_wire_format_keys, test_build_complete_wire_format_values, and test_build_complete_round_trip_with_wire_format_data.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `AgentHeartbeatPayload` has mutable default factory for `metadata` (not `{}` directly)
completion_promises.evidence: Added 'metadata: dict[str, Any] = Field(default_factory=dict, description=...)' to AgentHeartbeatPayload. Verified by test_heartbeat_has_metadata_field, test_metadata_defaults_to_empty_dict, test_metadata_uses_default_factory_not_mutable_default (checks distinct object identity), test_metadata_field_has_default_factory (checks field_info.default_factory is not None), and test_metadata_mutation_does_not_affect_other_instances.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] All payload classes importable from `nats_core.events` (top-level re-export)
completion_promises.evidence: All 13 payload classes are importable from nats_core.events and listed in __all__. Verified by test_all_13_importable_from_events and test_all_13_in_dunder_all.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: All 4 modified/created files pass 'ruff check' and 'ruff format --check' with zero errors: src/nats_core/events/_pipeline.py, src/nats_core/events/_fleet.py, tests/test_event_payloads_nc03.py, tests/test_event_type_schemas.py.
